message:
chore: add missing ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Prevent accidental commits of runtime artifacts, build outputs,
agent-generated scratch files, SQLite corruption snapshots, and
other ephemeral files that were showing up as untracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,3 +3,11 @@
 target/
 a.out
 .ruff_cache/
+
+# SQLite runtime files
+storage.sqlite3
+storage.sqlite3-*
+*.sqlite3.bak
+
+# Go reference binary (built during conformance tests)
+tests/conformance/go_reference/bvr
